whatWasImplemented: Playwright spec e2e/signup-to-chat.spec.ts with 5 tests covering VAL-CROSS-001 — the full new-user journey from seeded signup → dashboard → setup/crawl progress → embed snippet → widget loader boot → chat end-to-end. Signup uses the existing authedPage fixture (POST /auth/v1/signup under the hood). Crawl completion is simulated by flipping sites.crawl_status to 'ready' directly via the service-role client — this represents the outcome of /api/crawl/webhook's completed handler without requiring real Firecrawl API reachability. Widget loader boot is verified by setContent()-ing an HTML host page with the real public/rubycrawl-loader.js script, waiting for the shadow-root #rubycrawl-root host + .rc-bubble to attach. End-to-end chat uses a keyword-type custom_response with a citation-formatted answer, so the stream route's canned path carries the whole request-to-response pipe (site_key lookup → subscription gate → quota RPC → response matcher → /api/chat/stream canned branch) without requiring a live OpenAI call.
whatWasLeftUndone: Citation-generation via the real RAG path (embedding + streamText) is NOT exercised end-to-end. Server-side OpenAI fetch cannot be intercepted by Playwright's page.route (which only sees browser traffic), and real OpenAI calls in test require a live API key which the harness doesn't set. The canned-response substitution is the most rigorous observable proof without swapping in an in-process OpenAI mock — which would be a larger harness change than this milestone's scope.
discoveredIssues: Pre-existing hydration warning on /dashboard/embed: EmbedClient computes `origin` client-side only (useState init lambda with window.location.origin), so the SSR'd <code> block shows `src="/rubycrawl-loader.js"` while the client renders the full URL. Warning is logged but the final rendered snippet IS correct (tests assert against the client-rendered text). Not in scope for M9; tracked as a pre-existing UX issue.

verification.testsRun: pnpm exec playwright test e2e/signup-to-chat.spec.ts — 5/5 passing (41.9s)

manualChecks.action: Visit /dashboard/setup with site.crawl_status='crawling'; flip to 'ready' via service role
manualChecks.expected: First shows 'Building your chatbot.' heading; after flip (with polling fallback reload) shows 'Your chatbot' + 'is ready.'
Pre-code snippet contains data-site-key="<seeded>", /rubycrawl-loader.js, and data-api-base=""

manualChecks.action: setContent() HTML page with real /rubycrawl-loader.js script pointing at baseURL
POST /api/chat/session message='what are your hours?' → GET /api/chat/stream?sid=... with a canned response 'Our hours are Monday through Friday, 9am–5pm. [source: Home — https://example.com/]'
manualChecks.expected: Stream body contains 'Monday through Friday' + '[source: Home' + URL
manualChecks.observed: All substrings present; full round-trip clean.
